items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand... Investment opinion Buy - Citi
items.snippet: Citi has raised its investment opinion on Albemarle (ALB), a global lithium producer, from High Risk to Buy. The target price remains at $225. Citi adjusted its estimates to reflect the lithium market outlook and price assumptions ahead of the 2026 fiscal second-quarter earnings

items.headline: Lithium Mining Market Generates $5.31 Billion in 2025 with Strong Long-Term Growth Outlook

items.headline: This Divvie is the Ultimate Pick and Shovel Play on Elon Inc.
